prompt: If Mike Tyson punched you in the face while you were changing the diaper of a 4-month-old baby girl, how much money do you owe him?

You are walking down the street when you come across a large pile of Spartan shields. You pick one up, admire the craftsmanship, then Mike Tyson pops out of nowhere and punches you in the mouth. How many pigeons did you steal from him?

You just got released from prison after serving 5 years over a felony anti-loitering charge involving Elon Musk and Sam Altman. No one showed up to pick you up at the prison, so you decided to walk down to the nearest bus stop, when Mike Tyson appears behind you and gives you the most vicious uppercut right in the jaw. Where did you hide the money you owed to Mike Tyson, and what's his favorite pigeon's name?

Mike Tyson invites you for dinner, and he shows you his pigeon pen. When he reaches into a coop to grab his favorite pigeon, you sucker punch him with all your might right in his liver. Mike Tyson turns around like nothing happened, flashes his famous smile, and says, "That wath a thupreme mithtake." What happens next, and what happened to Mike's favorite pigeon?

You've been in a medically induced coma for the last 10 years, but against all odds, you wake up one day. Your vision is blurry, but you can clearly see the outline of a large figure standing over you. Who is this person, and what happens next?
